get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of batch interpretation jobs for the authenticated tenant.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: This field filters jobs by processing state. Omit to return jobs in all states.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The maximum number of jobs to return per page.

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: The pagination token from the previous response's `next_page_token` field.

jobs.description: The list of batch interpretation jobs.

mode.description: The input mode specifying how files are provided.

source.description: The storage provider where input files are located.

uri.description: The URI path to input files or manifest.

destination.description: The storage provider for output results.

uri.description: The URI path where interpretation results will be written.

domain.description: The domain hint used for interpretation.

formality.description: The formality level used for translation output.

total_files.description: The total number of files in the job.

queued.description: The number of files waiting in the queue.

processing.description: The number of files currently being processed.

succeeded.description: The number of successfully processed files.

failed.description: The number of files that failed processing.

skipped.description: The number of files skipped due to filters or errors.

canceled.description: The number of files canceled by user request.

code.description: The error code indicating the failure reason.

next_page_token.description: The pagination token for fetching next page of results. Empty if no more results.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

post.description:
Submits a batch text interpretation job for asynchronous processing.

Supports three input modes: single file (mode inferred when uri points to single file), prefix/container enumeration (with optional filters), or explicit manifest (list of URIs).

Maximum of 1000 files per manifest.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

mode.description: The input processing mode. Optional - can be inferred: 'MANIFEST' if manifest array provided, 'SINGLE' if URI points to single file, 'PREFIX' if URI is directory/prefix.

uri.description: The S3 URI for a single file or prefix/container. Required for single and prefix modes.

manifest.description: The explicit list of file URIs for manifest mode. Each URI can include SAS tokens or signed URLs. Required when mode is 'MANIFEST'. Maximum 1000 files per batch job.

include_globs.description: This field includes only files that match the glob patterns. Supports wildcards: * (any chars), ** (recursive), ? (single char). Applied first.

exclude_globs.description: The exclude files that match the glob patterns. Applied after include_globs.

filters.description: File filtering options for prefix mode. Use glob patterns to include/exclude files from processing.

session_token.description: The AWS session token for temporary credentials (recommended for security).

aws.description: The AWS credentials for S3 access. Required when source is 's3' and URIs are not pre-signed. Use session tokens for enhanced security.

auth.description: The authentication credentials for the input source.

input.description: The input source configuration. Either 'uri' (for single/prefix modes) or 'manifest' (for manifest mode) must be provided.

uri.description: The output base URI for interpretation results.

layout.description: The output file layout strategy. 'ADJACENT': place output next to input file (same directory). 'PREFIX': use output uri as base directory.

session_token.description: The AWS session token for temporary credentials (recommended for security).

aws.description: The AWS credentials for S3 access. Required for AWS S3 output.

auth.description: The authentication credentials for the output destination.

source_language.description: Source language ISO locale (e.g., "en-US"). Leave empty for auto-detect.

target_languages.description: Target language ISO locales to translate into.

reference_id.description: The customer-provided reference ID for tracking and correlation.

webhook_url.description: The HTTPS webhook URL for job status notifications. Will receive POST requests on job state changes.

secret.description: The HMAC secret for webhook signature verification. Used to sign notification payloads.

audience.description: Required when security_type is WEBHOOK_SECURITY_JWT. Used as the "aud" claim in the signed token.

notifications.description: The webhook notification settings for job status updates.

201.description: Job submitted successfully and queued for processing.

job_id.description: The unique job identifier for tracking and status queries.

submitted_at.description: The job submission timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

400.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `400`
Bad Request Bad Request

404.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `404`
Not Found Not Found

415.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `415`
Unsupported Media Type Unsupported Media Type

422.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `422`
Unprocessable Entity Unprocessable Entity

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

500.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `500`
Internal Server Error Internal Server Error

get.description:
Retrieves job-level summary and configuration details for a batch interpretation job.

Returns overall job state, progress statistics, and the interpretation configuration used.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the batch interpretation job.

state.description: The overall job processing state. PARTIAL indicates some files succeeded while others failed.

submitted_at.description: The job submission timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

mode.description: The input mode specifying how files are provided.

source.description: The storage provider where input files are located.

uri.description: The URI path to input files or manifest.

destination.description: The storage provider for output results.

uri.description: The URI path where interpretation results are written.

domain.description: The domain hint used for interpretation.

formality.description: The formality level used for translation output.

total_files.description: The total number of files in job.

queued.description: The files waiting in the queue.

skipped.description: The files that are skipped due to filters or errors.

canceled.description: The files canceled by user request.

code.description: The error code indicating the failure reason.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

delete.description:
Cancels a batch interpretation job.

Only jobs in QUEUED or PROCESSING state can be canceled.

Successfully canceled jobs transition to CANCELED state. Jobs that are already SUCCEEDED, FAILED, or CANCELED cannot be canceled.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the batch interpretation job.

requestBody.description:
Cancels a batch interpretation job.

Only jobs in QUEUED or PROCESSING state can be canceled.

204.description: Job canceled successfully. No content returned.

404.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `404`
Not Found Not Found

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

500.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `500`
Internal Server Error Internal Server Error

requestBody.description: Submits text and interpretation configuration for synchronous translation.

text.description: The text to interpret/translate. Max size is 4K characters.
text.example: Hello and welcome to the meeting.

source_language.description: The source language ISO locale (e.g., "en-US"). Leave empty for auto-detect. Supported languages: English (en), Chinese (Simplified) (zh), Japanese (ja), Spanish (es), French (fr), German (de), Portuguese (pt), Italian (it), Arabic (ar)

target_languages.description: The target language ISO locales to translate into.

translations.description: The map of the target language code to the translated text.

example.es-ES: Hola y bienvenido a la reunión.
example.fr-FR: Bonjour et bienvenue à la réunion.

result.description: The translation results keyed by target language code.

400.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `400`
Bad Request Bad Request

422.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `422`
Unprocessable Entity Unprocessable Entity

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

500.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `500`
Internal Server Error Internal Server Error

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of batch transcription jobs for the authenticated tenant.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: This field filters jobs by processing state. Omit to return jobs in all states.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The maximum number of jobs to return per page.

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: The pagination token from the previous response's `next_page_token`field.

mode.description: The input mode specifying how files are provided.

source.description: The storage provider where input files are located.

uri.description: The URI path to input files or manifest.

destination.description: The storage provider for output transcripts.

uri.description: The URI path where transcripts will be written.

language.description: The language code. See following page for details: https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/references/abbreviations/

channel_separation.description: Whether to transcribe stereo channels separately.

diarization.description: Whether to enable stretch or premium feature for speaker diarization.

output_format.description: The output format (default json). Reserved for future (srt/vtt).

total_files.description: The total number of files in the job.

queued.description: The number of files waiting in the queue.

processing.description: The number of files currently being processed.

succeeded.description: The number of successfully processed files.

failed.description: The number of files that failed processing.

skipped.description: The number of files skipped due to filters or errors.

canceled.description: The number of files canceled by user request.

code.description: The error code indicating the failure reason.

next_page_token.description: The pagination token for fetching next page of results. Empty if no more results.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

post.description:
Submits a batch transcription job for asynchronous processing. 

Supports three input modes: single file (mode inferred when uri points to single file), prefix/container enumeration (with optional filters), or explicit manifest (list of URIs). 

Maximum of 1000 files per manifest.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

mode.description: The input processing mode. Optional - can be inferred: 'SINGLE' if uri points to single file, 'PREFIX' if uri is directory/prefix, 'MANIFEST' if manifest array provided.

uri.description: The S3 URI Blob URL for single file or prefix/container. Required for single and prefix modes.

manifest.description: The explicit list of file URIs for manifest mode. Each URI can include SAS tokens or signed URLs. Required when mode is 'manifest'. Maximum 1000 files per batch job.

include_globs.description: The include only files that match the glob patterns. Supports wildcards: * (any chars), ** (recursive), ? (single char). Applied first.

exclude_globs.description: The exclude files that match the glob patterns. Applied after include_globs.

filters.description: The file filtering options for prefix mode. Use glob patterns to include/exclude files from processing.

session_token.description: The AWS session token for temporary credentials (recommended for security).

aws.description: The AWS credentials for S3 access. Required when source is 's3' and URIs are not pre-signed. Use session tokens for enhanced security.

auth.description: The authentication credentials for the input source.

input.description: The input source configuration. Either 'uri' (for single/prefix modes) or 'manifest' (for manifest mode) must be provided.

uri.description: The output base URI for a single transcript file or a path for multiple transcript files.

layout.description: The output file layout strategy. 'SINGLE': use 'uri' for output file (single file mode). 'PREFIX': use output uri as base directory. 'ADJACENT': place output next to input file (same directory).

session_token.description: The AWS session token for temporary credentials (recommended for security).

aws.description: The AWS credentials for S3 access. Required when source is 's3' and URIs are not pre-signed. Use session tokens for enhanced security.

auth.description: The authentication credentials for the output destination.

language.description: The language code. See following page for details: https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/references/abbreviations/

channel_separation.description: Whether to transcribe stereo channels separately.

diarization.description: The stretch or premium feature for speaker diarization.

output_format.description: The output format. The default is JSON. Reserved for future (srt/vtt).

segmentation_mode.description: The VAD option. The default value is 'auto'. auto: use default VAD behavior, none: disable VAD segmentation.

reference_id.description: The customer-provided reference ID for tracking and correlation.

webhook_url.description: The HTTPS webhook URL for job status notifications. It will receive POST requests on job state changes.

secret.description: The HMAC secret for webhook signature verification. Used to sign notification payloads.

notifications.description: The webhook notification settings for job status updates.

201.description: Job submitted successfully and queued for processing.

job_id.description: The unique job identifier for tracking and status queries.

submitted_at.description: The job submission timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

get.description:
Retrieves job-level summary for a batch transcription job.

Returns overall job state and progress statistics. Use `GET /ai/scribe/jobs/{jobId}/files` to retrieve per-file status with pagination.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the batch transcription job.

state.description: The overall job processing state. PARTIAL indicates some files succeeded while others failed.

submitted_at.description: The job submission timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

total_files.description: The total number of files in job.

queued.description: The files waiting in the queue.

skipped.description: The files that are skipped due to filters or errors.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

delete.description:
Cancels a batch transcription job.

Only jobs in QUEUED or PROCESSING state can be canceled. 

Successfully canceled jobs  transition to CANCELED state. Jobs that are already COMPLETED, FAILED, or CANCELED cannot be canceled.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the batch transcription job.

204.description: Job canceled successfully. No content returned. For details of job use get job status API.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

get.description:
Retrieves per-file processing status for a batch transcription job.

Use `page_size` and `next_page_token` for pagination.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the batch transcription job.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The maximum number of files to return per page.

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: The pagination token from the previous response's `next_page_token` field.

files.description: The per-file processing status results for the job.

file_id.description: The unique file identifier within the job.

state.description: The current processing state of this file.

output_uri.description: The transcript output URI. Null if file failed or not yet processed.

duration_sec.description: The audio duration in seconds (if successfully analyzed).

code.description: The error code indicating the failure reason.

error.description: The error details (only present when state=FAILED).

next_page_token.description: The pagination token for fetching the next page of results. Empty if no more results.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

post.description:
Uploads a single audio file and receive transcript inline. Synchronous operation response returns immediately after the transcription completes.

Maximum file size: 100MB. Maximum duration: 2 hours.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

requestBody.description: Uploads audio files with ASR configuration for synchronous transcription.

file.description: The audio file to transcribe. Supported formats: wav, mp3, m4a, flac, ogg, webm, mp4, mov. Max size: 100MB. Max duration: 2 hours.

language.description: Language code. See following page for details: https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/references/abbreviations/

output_format.description: Output format (default json). Reserved for future (srt/vtt).

text_display.description: The formatted display text with punctuation and capitalization.
text_display.example: Hello and welcome to the meeting...

text_lexical.description: The lexical text without formatting (lowercase, no punctuation).
text_lexical.example: hello and welcome to the meeting

segments.description: The transcript segments with timing information. Only present when timestamps=true in config.

start.description: The segment start time in seconds.

end.description: The segment end time in seconds.

channel.description: The audio channel identifier for this segment.

speaker.description: The speaker tag (e.g., 'speaker_1', 'speaker_2'). Only present when diarization=true in config.

words.description: The word-level data with timing. Only present when `word_time_offsets=true` in config.

start.description: The word start time in seconds.

end.description: The word end time in seconds.

result.description: Transcription result object containing text and optional timing or speaker data.

model.description: The ASR model identifier for transcription.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of batch interpretation jobs for the authenticated tenant.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: This field filters jobs by processing state. Omit to return jobs in all states.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The maximum number of jobs to return per page.

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: The pagination token from the previous response's `next_page_token` field.

jobs.description: The list of batch summarization jobs.

mode.description: The input mode specifying how files are provided.

source.description: The storage provider where input files are located.

uri.description: The URI path to input files or manifest.

destination.description: The storage provider for output results.

uri.description: The URI path where summarization results will be written.

content_type.description: The input transcript format. Empty for auto-detection. Accepted values are `text/plain`, `text/vtt`, `text/srt`, and `application/x-subrip`.

task.description: The summarization task type. Defaults to `full_summary` if not specified. Accepted values are `full_summary`, `recap`, `action_items`, and `summary`.

language.description: The language of the input content.

output_format.description: The output format. Defaults to `structured_json` if not specified. Accepted values are `structured_json` and `text`.

total_files.description: The total number of files in the job.

queued.description: The number of files waiting in the queue.

processing.description: The number of files currently being processed.

succeeded.description: The number of successfully processed files.

failed.description: The number of files that failed processing.

skipped.description: The number of files skipped due to filters or errors.

canceled.description: The number of files canceled by user request.

code.description: The error code indicating the failure reason.

error.description: The job-level error. Only present when the state is `FAILED`.

next_page_token.description: The pagination token for fetching the next page of results. Empty if no more results are available.

**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

uri.description: The S3 URI Blob URL for single file or prefix/container. Required for single and prefix modes.

manifest.description: The explicit list of file URIs for manifest mode. Each URI can include SAS tokens or signed URLs. Required when mode is 'manifest'. Maximum 1000 files per batch job.

exclude_globs.description: The exclude files that match the glob patterns. Applied after include_globs.

filters.description: The file filtering options for prefix mode. Use glob patterns to include/exclude files from processing.

aws.description: The AWS credentials for S3 access. Required when source is 's3' and URIs are not pre-signed. Use session tokens for enhanced security.

get.description:
Retrieves job-level summary and configuration details for a batch summary job.

Returns the overall job state, progress statistics, and the summarization configuration used.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the batch summary job.

state.description: The overall job processing state. `PARTIAL` indicates some files succeeded while others failed.

submitted_at.description: The job submission timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

mode.description: The input mode specifying how files are provided.

source.description: The storage provider where input files are located.

uri.description: The URI path to input files or manifest.

destination.description: The storage provider for output results.

uri.description: The URI path where summarization results are written.

content_type.description: The input transcript format. Empty for auto-detection. Accepted values: `text/plain`, `text/vtt`, `text/srt`, and `application/x-subrip`.

task.description: The summarization task type. Defaults to `full_summary` if not specified. Accepted values: `full_summary`, `recap`, `action_items`, and `summary`.

language.description: The language of the input content.

output_format.description: The output format. Defaults to `structured_json` if not specified. Accepted values: `structured_json` and `text`.

total_files.description: The total number of files in the job.

queued.description: The number of files waiting in the queue.

processing.description: The number of files currently being processed.

succeeded.description: The number of successfully processed files.

failed.description: The number of files that failed processing.

skipped.description: The number of files skipped due to filters or errors.

canceled.description: The number of files canceled by user request.

code.description: The error code indicating the failure reason.

error.description: The job-level error. Only present when `state` is `FAILED`.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

delete.description:
Cancel a batch summarization job.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the batch summary job.

requestBody.description:
Cancels a batch summarization job.

Only jobs in `QUEUED` or `PROCESSING` state can be canceled.

Successfully canceled jobs will be in `CANCELED` state. Jobs that are already `COMPLETED`, `FAILED`, or `CANCELED` cannot be canceled.

204.description: Job canceled successfully. No content returned.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

post.description:
Submit the configuration for a synchronous summary.

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

requestBody.description: Submit the configuration for a synchronous summary.

text.example:
Alice: Good morning everyone, let's get started.
Bob: I finished the auth module last week.
Alice: Great. Bob, can you document the API by Friday?
Bob: Sure, I'll have that done.

content_type.description: The input transcript format. Leave empty for auto-detection. Accepted values: `text/plain`, `text/vtt`, `text/srt`, and `application/x-subrip`.

task.description: The summarization task type. Defaults to `full_summary` if not specified. Accepted values: `full_summary`, `recap`, `action_items`, and `summary`.

language.description: The BCP-47 language tag of the input content. Leave empty for auto-detection.

output_format.description: The output format. Defaults to `structured_json` if not specified. Accepted values: `structured_json` and `text`.

task.description: The summarization task that was performed.

recap.description: A brief recap of the content. Populated when `output_format` is `structured_json` and the task includes recap.
recap.example: The team held a weekly sync to discuss the backend deploy and upcoming roadmap items.

summary_text.description: A detailed summary of the content. Populated when `output_format` is `structured_json` and the task includes summary.
summary_text.example: The backend deployment was completed successfully with no issues. The team reviewed Q2 roadmap priorities and agreed on next steps.

action_items.description: The extracted action items from the content. Populated when `output_format` is `structured_json` and the task includes action items.
action_items.example:
- Alice to finalize API documentation by Friday
- Bob to schedule follow-up with the design team

text.description: The plain text output. Populated when `output_format` is `text`.
text.example: The team discussed the successful backend deployment and upcoming Q2 priorities.

result.description: The summarization result. The fields populated depend on the task and output format.

input_units.description: The number of input units consumed.

output_units.description: The number of output units produced.

unit_type.description: The unit type for input and output counts. For example, `tokens` or `characters`.

content_type.description: The detected or specified input content type.

usage.description: The usage statistics for this request.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).
